name: research-plan
description: Research external evidence plus local code context, then synthesize an implementation plan

parallel.label: External evidence
parallel.task:
Research external docs, source code, release notes, and ecosystem behavior relevant to this request. Prefer primary sources and include citations.

Request: {task}

parallel.label: Local code
parallel.task:
Build local codebase context for this request. Identify relevant files, patterns, constraints, tests, and validation commands. Do not modify files.

Request: {task}

chain.label: Synthesize plan
